# Portal.view.home.ContentBox: try out a box-shadow instead of a border

Definitely a topic for @mxmrtns:

For me, a border is not as good as a content separation as a box-shadow.

`box-shadow: 0 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);`
feels too much (same value as the header shadow)

`box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);`
feels nicer.

![Screenshot 2024-08-01 at 19 53 43](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/71874965-2a9a-46fd-9fa0-4a71584b6809)

![Screenshot 2024-08-01 at 20 04 23](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3ee95790-d7e6-4bfa-8e76-5e128f7b9ff1)
